summary: Merbinger, a swordsman, responds to Elric's request for assistance with the Blue Lions' position. Merbinger is confident in his abilities and offers his help, but warns that inheriting the Blue Lions' position will require great strength. Meanwhile, a flashback shows Merbinger's past as the third brother of the Hawk family, where he learned the fundamental movements of combat from his brothers.
key_moments: Elric requests assistance with the Blue Lions' position
Merbinger responds and offers to help, warning of the challenges involved
A flashback shows Merbinger's past as a member of the Hawk family
